name: Reyna Mortgage Group | Mortgage Lender – Berwyn, Cicero, Chicago, FHA, Conventional, DSCR, FixNFlip, Down Payment, Grants
description_short: Neighborhood Loans (operating as Reyna Mortgage Group) is a mortgage lender offering FHA, VA, conventional, and specialty loans through NMLS-licensed officer Sergio Reyna in the Chicago area.
description_long:
Neighborhood Loans, branded as Reyna Mortgage Group, operates as a mortgage lending operation based in the Chicago metropolitan area (Berwyn, Cicero, Chicago). The company is represented by Sergio Reyna, a Senior Mortgage Loan Officer with NMLS #1726208, who serves as the primary point of contact for loan origination. The business focuses on residential mortgage financing for homebuyers and refinancing clients.

The company offers multiple loan products including conventional mortgages, FHA loans, FHA Streamline refinances, VA loans, ARM (adjustable-rate mortgages), and Jumbo loans. They provide online application and pre-approval within 24 hours, with a stated five-step process from application through closing. The website includes a mortgage payment calculator allowing borrowers to estimate monthly payments including principal, interest, taxes, insurance, HOI, and PMI. Sergio Reyna can be reached via phone (708-642-7890, 773-917-8589, 773-435-6495) or email.

The company differentiates itself through core values emphasizing transparency, integrity, and a process-driven approach. Customer reviews highlight responsive communication, rate shopping, and assistance with specialized products like 203K renovation loans. The five-step process is documented clearly on their website, positioning the loan processor as a central coordinator between the applicant and underwriter. The company also advertises mortgage servicing and insurance services alongside lending.

Limitations include reliance on a single identified loan officer (Sergio Reyna) as the public-facing representative, which may create capacity constraints. The website does not provide transparent pricing, rate sheets, or detailed underwriting criteria. Despite claims of specialty loan products (DSCR, Fix-N-Flip, down payment grants) in the business name, these are not detailed on the actual website content provided. Customer reviews are limited and partial on the website, and there is no clear information about whether the company is a direct lender, broker, or correspondent.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Pre-approval available within 24 hours with online application
Multiple loan types available including FHA, VA, conventional, Jumbo, and ARM options
Specialized product experience documented (203K renovation loans per reviews)
Five-step process clearly outlined and explained on website
Licensed loan officer (NMLS #1726208) with multiple contact methods (phone, email)
Responsive communication highlighted in customer reviews (text, call, email availability)
Rate shopping mentioned as part of their service model
cons: Single identified loan officer creates potential bottleneck for customer service capacity
No transparent pricing, rate sheets, or rate comparison information published
Website claims specialty products (DSCR, Fix-N-Flip, grants) not detailed or explained in actual content
Limited customer reviews visible; one review is cut off mid-sentence
No information clarifying whether company operates as direct lender, broker, or correspondent
best_for: First-time homebuyers in Chicago area seeking FHA loans with quick pre-approval
Refinance applicants looking for FHA Streamline or conventional refi options
Borrowers with VA benefits seeking VA-backed mortgage loans
Homebuyers interested in renovation financing (203K loans per customer reviews)
diagnosis: Neighborhood Loans is best suited for Chicago-area borrowers seeking straightforward mortgage products (conventional, FHA, VA) with responsive customer service from an NMLS-licensed loan officer. The main caveat is the absence of transparent pricing and limited documentation of specialty products claimed in the business name—borrowers should directly contact Sergio Reyna to verify rate availability and specific loan program eligibility.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
